case_title: AUBHISHEK ZAMAN VS. CHIH WEI CHIU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUL-15-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF AUBHISHEK ZAMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHIH WEI CHIU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVEIWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAMAN, AUBHISHEK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHIU, CHIH WEI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
